PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65.92) SERVED APR-12-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT INOZEMTSEV, ROMAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY COUNTY TAX COLLECTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT INOZEMTSEV, ROMAN *PLAINTIFF ADMITTED THAT DEFENDANT QUALIFIED FOR SERVICE WITHOUT COST AND FAILED TO PROVIDE SUPPORT FOR ALTERNATE REASON FOR DENIAL OF BENEFITS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
